posts.author: jthorn (Josiah Thorngate)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Add filters to the subitems widget in the item view.

What are you trying to achieve

Filter subitems displayed in the widget (eg by Status column)…I use a “Record Type” status column to differentiate between subitems, and a different set of columns is pertinent to each type. So by combining filters with the hide column feature, I can display only what I want to within a given widget, and then add either widgets or additional views for each subitem type.
